family.name: Access Control
family.summary: Controls related to logical and physical access to systems and data.

controls.title: Authorized users only
controls.description: Limit information system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, or devices.

guide.body: Document and enforce an access control policy. Configure accounts with least privilege, review access logs regularly, and remove stale accounts promptly.

controls.title: Access enforcement
controls.description: Ensure access enforcement mechanisms are in place for all systems.

guide.body: Identify all systems in scope and confirm that role-based access control (RBAC) is configured consistently. Document enforcement points and monitoring.
